summary: Testing of School Dashboard redesign and Buffer integration completed. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Dashboard layout with Benvenuto+Iscrizioni top row, Il mio percorso full-width second row, Le prossime occasioni + Materiali section, Dalla bacheca, and clickable events that navigate to course detail pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard layout follows requested hierarchy: Benvenuto+Iscrizioni → Il mio percorso → (Occasioni+Materiali) | Dalla bacheca
Welcome card has merged text without separate greeting block
3 action buttons with icon+text layout and green hover styling detected
Events are clickable buttons that navigate to /course/{course_id}
Materiali section shows 'Risorse pratiche', 'Esempi e contenuti dai corsi', and 'Esplora i materiali' button
Buffer profiles API returns Emanuele Casero LinkedIn profile (id: 69aabbc93f3b94a121205244)
Social profile prof_casero_li is correctly linked to Buffer profile
Test post post_bad04ab3e572 was successfully published to Buffer (buffer_post_id: 69aacbee94a16103613fb1ba)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Dashboard redesign complete. Key verifications: (1) Top row: Benvenuto + Iscrizioni aperte at equal height, (2) Welcome card has merged text, (3) 3 action buttons with green hover, (4) Il mio percorso full-width with progress bar, (5) Events clickable → navigate to /course/{id}, (6) Materiali section with 2 resource types and Esplora button, (7) Dalla bacheca shows community posts, (8) Buffer integration working - profiles API returns Emanuele Casero LinkedIn, prof_casero_li linked to Buffer, test post published successfully.

features_verified.dashboard_top_row_equal_height: PASS - Benvenuto (left) + Iscrizioni aperte (right) at equal height
features_verified.welcome_merged_text: PASS - No separate greeting block, unified welcome message
features_verified.action_buttons_3_with_icons: PASS - 3 buttons: Entra nella community, Coltiva il percorso, Resta aggiornato/a
features_verified.action_buttons_green_hover: PASS - Hover styling detected in button HTML
features_verified.il_mio_percorso_full_width: PASS - Full-width second row with progress bar
features_verified.events_clickable: PASS - Events are button elements with click navigation
features_verified.upcoming_events_have_course_id: PASS - API returns course_id in upcoming_events
features_verified.materiali_esempi_contenuti: PASS - 'Esempi e contenuti dai corsi' subsection visible
features_verified.dalla_bacheca_section: PASS - Community posts from trainers visible

interest_badges_note: Interest/enrollment badges (Interessato/a, Confermato/a, Iscritto/a) are implemented but not visible in current test - user has not expressed interest in any courses. To test badges, call POST /api/school/training-courses/{course_id}/interest
